sentences.target: Il manque un centimètre pour fermer.

translations.fr: Il manque un centimètre pour fermer.
translations.en: We’re missing one centimeter to close it.
translations.ru: Не хватает одного сантиметра, чтобы закрыть.
translations.vi: Còn thiếu một xăng-ti-mét để đóng lại.
translations.nl: Er ontbreekt één centimeter om het dicht te krijgen.
translations.uk: Не вистачає одного сантиметра, щоб закрити.
translations.hi: बंद करने के लिए एक सेंटीमीटर कम है.
translations.el: Λείπει ένα εκατοστό για να κλείσει.
translations.nb: Det mangler én centimeter for å lukke.
translations.sv: Det saknas en centimeter för att kunna stänga.
translations.ro: Lipsește un centimetru ca să se închidă.
translations.cs: Chybí jeden centimetr, aby se to zavřelo.
translations.da: Der mangler en centimeter for at lukke.
translations.ja: 閉めるには1センチ足りない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun serving as impersonal/expletive subject in the existential construction; 3rd person singular masculine.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd singular; intransitive here meaning ‘to be missing’, agreeing with the postponed notional subject.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; notional subject of ‘manque’ (postposed).
Preposition marking purpose (‘in order to’), introducing an infinitival complement.
Verb in the infinitive; complement of ‘pour’ expressing intended purpose.

sentences.target: Tu peux couper un centimètre, s’il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø kupe œ̃ sɑ̃timɛtʁ sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux couper un centimètre, s’il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø kupe œ̃ sɑ̃timɛtʁ sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you cut one centimeter, please?
translations.vi: Làm ơn cắt bớt một xăng-ti-mét.
translations.fi: Ole hyvä ja leikkaa yksi sentti pois.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular subject (informal).
Finite verb, present indicative 2nd singular; modal auxiliary expressing ability.
Verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal ‘peux’.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘couper’.
Contraction of subordinating conjunction ‘si’ with pronoun ‘il’; introduces a conditional subordinate clause (‘if it’).
Clitic personal pronoun, 2nd person singular indirect object (dative) of ‘plaît’.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd singular; in ‘s’il te plaît’, expresses ‘if it pleases you’ (polite formula).

sentences.target: Je marque un centimètre sur ton ourlet.
sentences.reading: /ʒə maʁk œ̃ sɑ̃timɛtʁ syʁ tɔ̃ uʁlɛ/

translations.fr: Je marque un centimètre sur ton ourlet.
translations.ipa: /ʒə maʁk œ̃ sɑ̃timɛtʁ syʁ tɔ̃ uʁlɛ/
translations.en: I mark one centimeter on your hem.
translations.es: Marco un centímetro en tu dobladillo.
translations.de: Ich markiere einen Zentimeter an deinem Saum.
translations.it: Segno un centimetro sul tuo orlo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在你的下摆上标记一厘米。
translations.yue: 我喺你嘅褲腳度做一厘米記號。
translations.ru: Я отмечаю один сантиметр на твоём подоле.
translations.pt: Marco um centímetro na sua barra.
translations.he: אני מסמן סנטימטר אחד במכפלת שלך.
translations.vi: Tôi đánh dấu một xăng-ti-mét trên gấu quần của bạn.
translations.ar: أعلّم سنتيمترًا واحدًا على الثنية لديك.
translations.nl: Ik markeer één centimeter op je zoom.
translations.uk: Я відмічаю один сантиметр на твоєму підгині.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारी मोड़ पर एक सेंटीमीटर का निशान लगाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Zaznaczam jeden centymetr na twoim podwinięciu.
translations.el: Σημαδεύω ένα εκατοστό στο στρίφωμά σου.
translations.nb: Jeg markerer én centimeter på oppbretten din.
translations.id: Saya menandai satu sentimeter pada kelimanmu.
translations.sv: Jag markerar en centimeter på din fåll.
translations.ro: Marchez un centimetru pe tivul tău.
translations.cs: Označím jeden centimetr na tvém lemu.
translations.da: Jeg markerer én centimeter på din sømkant.
translations.ja: 裾に1センチの印をつけます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular subject.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st singular; transitive ‘to mark’.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘marque’.
Preposition indicating location (‘on’); introduces a prepositional complement.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; masculine singular agreeing with ‘ourlet’.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition ‘sur’.

sentences.target: Nous laissons un centimètre entre les cadres.
sentences.reading: /nu lɛsɔ̃ œ̃ sɑ̃timɛtʁ ɑ̃tʁ le kadʁ/

translations.fr: Nous laissons un centimètre entre les cadres.
translations.ipa: /nu lɛsɔ̃ œ̃ sɑ̃timɛtʁ ɑ̃tʁ le kadʁ/
translations.en: We leave one centimeter between the frames.
translations.es: Dejamos un centímetro entre los marcos.
translations.de: Wir lassen einen Zentimeter Abstand zwischen den Rahmen.
translations.it: Lasciamo un centimetro tra le cornici.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在相框之间留出一厘米。
translations.yue: 我哋喺相框之間留一厘米。
translations.ru: Мы оставляем один сантиметр между рамками.
translations.pt: Deixamos um centímetro entre as molduras.
translations.he: אנחנו משאירים סנטימטר אחד בין המסגרות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chừa một xăng-ti-mét giữa các khung.
translations.nl: We laten één centimeter tussen de lijsten.
translations.uk: Ми залишаємо один сантиметр між рамками.
translations.hu: Egy centimétert hagyunk a keretek között.
translations.hi: हम फ़्रेमों के बीच एक सेंटीमीटर छोड़ते हैं.
translations.pl: Zostawiamy jeden centymetr odstępu między ramkami.
translations.el: Αφήνουμε ένα εκατοστό ανάμεσα στις κορνίζες.
translations.nb: Vi lar det være én centimeter mellom rammene.
translations.id: Kami menyisakan satu sentimeter di antara bingkai.
translations.sv: Vi lämnar en centimeter mellan ramarna.
translations.da: Vi lader en centimeter være mellem rammerne.
translations.ja: 額の間を1センチ空けます。

Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘laissons’.
Preposition indicating spatial relation (‘between’); introduces a complement.
Definite article determiner, plural; forms the NP ‘les cadres’ as complement of ‘entre’.
Common noun, masculine plural; complement of the preposition ‘entre’.
